2025-07-26.example: She gave a lucid presentation on climate change.

2025-07-27.meaning: tending to keep a firm hold of something; clinging or adhering closely.
2025-07-27.example: Her tenacious attitude helped her achieve her goals.

2025-07-28.meaning: concise and exact use of words in writing or speech.
2025-07-28.example: The strength of his speech lay in its brevity.

2025-07-29.meaning: Showing great energy or enthusiasm in pursuit of a cause or objective.
2025-07-29.example: She was a zealous supporter of environmental reforms.
